title: rubus × brachyodontus
intro: Rubus × brachyodontus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × brachyodontus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × brachyodontus can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to support overall well-being and prevent chronic diseases.
